query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "edit-compass & editreward-compass: a unified benchmark for image editi" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides a canonical benchmark for the same domain (image editing) and mechanism (evaluating model capabilities) as the user's question, serving as essential prior work for any follow-up study on image editing benchmarks. Although it introduces a new benchmark ("WiseEdit") rather than extending the specific "Edit-Compass" suite mentioned, it is a foundational reference for the field of image editing evaluation that a literature review would require
